project.title: Project
project.description: A video editing project in the portfolio.

category.description: The category of the project (e.g., Commercial, Travel).

videoUrl.description: URL to the project's video (e.g., YouTube, Vimeo, or direct link).

description.description: A brief description of the project.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the project was added.

uid.description: The UID of the user who added the project.
